svgContent:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="420" height="350">
  <defs>
    <linearGradient id="bg" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="0%" y2="100%">
      <stop offset="0%" style="stop-color:#E3F2FD"/>
      <stop offset="100%" style="stop-color:#BBDEFB"/>
    </linearGradient>
    <marker id="arrow" viewBox="0 0 10 10" refX="9" refY="5" markerWidth="6" markerHeight="6" orient="auto">
      <path d="M 0 0 L 10 5 L 0 10 z" fill="#1565C0"/>
    </marker>
  </defs>
  <rect width="420" height="350" fill="url(#bg)" rx="12"/>
  <text x="210" y="25" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="13" font-weight="bold" fill="#1565C0">Types of Inheritance</text>
  
  <!-- Single Inheritance -->
  <rect x="50" y="60" width="100" height="40" fill="#2196F3" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="100" y="85" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Parent Class
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="0.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  <rect x="75" y="120" width="50" height="40" fill="#64B5F6" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.7s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="100" y="145" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Child
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="0.9s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  <path d="M100 100 L100 120" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" marker-end="url(#arrow)" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.1s" fill="freeze"/>
  </path>
  <text x="100" y="170" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    Single
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Multiple Inheritance -->
  <rect x="230" y="60" width="100" height="40" fill="#2196F3" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="280" y="85" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Parent A
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.7s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  <rect x="290" y="60" width="100" height="40" fill="#2196F3" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.9s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="340" y="85" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Parent B
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.1s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  <rect x="310" y="120" width="50" height="40" fill="#64B5F6" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="2.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="335" y="145" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Child
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  <path d="M280 100 L315 120" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" marker-end="url(#arrow)" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.7s" fill="freeze"/>
  </path>
  <path d="M340 100 L335 120" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" marker-end="url(#arrow)" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.9s" fill="freeze"/>
  </path>
  <text x="335" y="170" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    Multiple
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="3.1s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Multilevel Inheritance -->
  <rect x="50" y="220" width="100" height="40" fill="#2196F3" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="3.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="100" y="245" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Grandparent
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="3.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  <rect x="75" y="280" width="50" height="40" fill="#64B5F6" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="3.7s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="100" y="305" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Parent
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="3.9s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  <rect x="87.5" y="340" width="25" height="40" fill="#64B5F6" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="4.1s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="100" y="365" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Child
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="4.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  <path d="M100 260 L100 280" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" marker-end="url(#arrow)" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="4.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </path>
  <path d="M100 320 L100 340" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" marker-end="url(#arrow)" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="4.7s" fill="freeze"/>
  </path>
  <text x="100" y="385" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    Multilevel
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="4.9s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Hierarchical Inheritance -->
  <rect x="230" y="220" width="100" height="40" fill="#2196F3" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="5.1s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="280" y="245" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Parent
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="5.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  <rect x="210" y="280" width="50" height="40" fill="#64B5F6" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="5.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="235" y="305" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Child A
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="5.7s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  <rect x="280" y="280" width="50" height="40" fill="#64B5F6" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="5.9s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="305" y="305" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Child B
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="6.1s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  <rect x="350" y="280" width="50" height="40" fill="#64B5F6" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="6.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="375" y="305" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Child C
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="6.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  <path d="M280 260 L235 280" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" marker-end="url(#arrow)" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="6.7s" fill="freeze"/>
  </path>
  <path d="M280 260 L305 280" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" marker-end="url(#arrow)" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="6.9s" fill="freeze"/>
  </path>
  <path d="M280 260 L375 280" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" marker-end="url(#arrow)" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="7.1s" fill="freeze"/>
  </path>
  <text x="280" y="325" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    Hierarchical
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="7.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
</svg>
